title: Vivo V70 FE confirmed to launched in India: Launch date, expected specs and all you need to know
summary: The Vivo V70 FE will launch in India on April 2, 2026. Leaks suggest that the device could feature a 200MP camera, a MediaTek 7360 processor, and a large 7000mAh battery.

title: X down for thousands of users, global outage disrupts timeline and mobile app
summary: Elon Musk's social media platform X is experiencing outages, affecting thousands of users. Downdetector reports over 30,000 complaints regarding the platform's functionality today.

title: Samsung reveals Galaxy A37, A57 India price: Check launch offers, specificiations and more
summary: Samsung has finally revealed the pricing for its Galaxy A series lineup which was launched yesterday. The Galaxy A37 begins at a price of ₹41,999 while the Galaxy A57 starts at ₹56,999.

title: One Tech Tip: Heres how AI can (and cant) help you in your job hunt
summary: One Tech Tip: Here's how AI can (and can't) help you in your job hunt

title: Meta to turn employees into ‘AI builders’, reorganize teams into smaller pods amid Reality Labs layoffs: Report
summary: Meta is rebranding employees as AI builders and organising them into pods within its Reality Labs division, according to a new report. The pilot program is aimed at enhancing engineering productivity and product quality through cross-disciplinary work.

title: Apple to 'distill' Google's Gemini into smaller models to power localized iPhone AI features: Report
summary: Apple's partnership with Google allows it to ‘distill’ Gemini model to create smaller models to run AI features on device on iPhones. Apple had earlier this year announced its partnership with Google to power Siri and run other AI features

title: Discord says technical issue resolved hours after users complained of downtime
summary: Discord had reported an issue after 14,000 users faced issues in connecting on voice call. Many reported seeing the message ‘awaiting endpoint’, signaling a failure to establish voice communication

title: Gemini gets a major upgrade as Google adds 3-minute AI music generation: here's how it works
summary: Gemini's new Lyria 3 Pro integration enables the creation of 3-minute music tracks with improved fidelity and customization. It supports diverse applications, from study music to jingles, while adhering to copyright policies with embedded SynthID watermarks for content verification.

title: Reddit will now ask accounts with ‘fishy behavior’ to verify they are human: here's how it will work
summary: Reddit is implementing measures to ensure users interact with real people, not AI. Reddit CEO Steve Huffman announced a targeted verification system for suspicious accounts and the use of third-party tools to confirm human identity of its users.

title: Musk rewrites IPO playbook with large slice of SpaceX stock for retail investors
summary: Elon Musk is discussing allocating as much as 30% of SpaceX's initial public offering to individual investors - at least ​three times the usual retail slice - leaning on his rabid fan base and other loyal backers to help steady the stock after its debut, a person familiar with the matter said.

title: EU accuses four porn platforms of letting children access adult content
summary: The European Union accused four pornographic platforms on Thursday of allowing children to access adult content in breach of digital rules, putting the companies at risk of large fines.

title: Elon Musk’s xAI unveils affordable SuperGrok Lite subscription priced at $10 per month
summary: The subscription plan offers users faster access to base-level AI images and videos. These videos will have a 480p resolution and a maximum duration of six seconds.

title: Is internet more AI-driven than human? Report reveals the way forward
summary: Per a report by cybersecurity firm HUMAN Security, in 2025, automated internet traffic grew 23.51% YoY, almost eight times faster than the 3.10% of human traffic. This follows the rise of GenAI assistants such as ChatGPT, Claude, and OpenClaw’s Clawbot, which extensively rely on continuous informati

title: Children exposure to social media big concern, need consensus for balanced approach: Ashwini Vaishnaw
summary: Citing a recent judgement by a US court holding social media firms responsible for addiction, Union minister Ashwini Vaishnaw said that every society is struggling with issues related to children's exposure to online platforms.

title: ChatGPT's taste for literary nonsense sparks alarm
summary: OpenAI's GPT models can often be fooled into declaring that "pseudo-literary" nonsense is great, a German researcher has found. His research presented the models with increasingly far-fetched variations of a simple text, asking them to rate sentences out of 10 for literary quality.

title: Dutch court orders xAI, Grok not to create, distribute non-consensual sex images in Netherlands
summary: The decision in a civil suit ​is one of the first times a ​judge has weighed in on xAI's responsibility for creating tools that ​can be used to ⁠create sexualised ‌images, amid a ​flood ​of complaints and investigations over ⁠Grok in the Americas, Europe, Asia ​and Australia.

title: Meta shares slip after US jury verdicts raise concerns of new legal exposure
summary: Meta shares fell 6% to a 10-month low on Thursday ​after rulings this week found ​the Facebook parent failed to adequately warn or protect ​young users, stoking concerns about billions of dollars in fines from new cases and follow-on litigation.

title: Karnataka most preferred hub for tech startups, says IT/BT minister Priyank Kharge
summary: The state IT/BT minister’s X post comes ahead of the release of a joint report by Nasscom and Zinnov, highlighting strong momentum in India’s startup ecosystem despite a more selective funding environment. Per the report, Bengaluru accounted for 28% of India’s deeptech startups as of 2025, followed

title: WhatsApp update: AI will now write your messages, touch up photos within chat
summary: According to the company, even for those using the Writing Help option, the chats will remain private. The update will let users manage storage, move chats between phones and use two WhatsApp accounts on one phone.
